授業方法: The course will be conducted primarily through student presentations, with the instructor providing feedback and supplementary explanations as needed. Specifically, students will be divided into 10 groups, and each group will be assigned one chapter from the textbook to present. (Chapters 1, 11, and 13 will be covered by the instructor.) At the beginning of each class, a comprehension-check quiz will be administered on the chapter to be discussed that day. A final examination will be held on the last day of the course.

トピック.授業外学習2: Students are expected to carefully read the assigned chapters of the textbook (approximately 10 pages per class) in preparation for each class.
